---
id: remove-labels-from-datasets
title: "Remove labels from datasets"

<Heading
  as={"h1"}

  children={"Remove labels from datasets"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/datasets/labels/remove"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Removes the specified labels from the datasets identified by `datasetIds`.

  as={"h2"}
